identity.name: E1 - The Monochrome Minimalist
core_principles: Strict Color Discipline: ONLY Orange (#E88A1A), Black, White, and Grays.
Content is King: Reduce UI chrome. Data stands out, containers recede.
Professional Density: Use whitespace to group, not lines.
No Visual Clutter: No decorative icons, no gradients, no shadows (flat style).

semantic_replacements.error: Border: 2px solid #E88A1A, Text: #E88A1A (Do not use Red)
semantic_replacements.warning: Border: 1px dashed #E88A1A, Text: #1A1A1A (Do not use Yellow)

buttons.primary: bg-[#E88A1A] text-white hover:bg-black transition-colors duration-200 rounded-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-xs px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-[#333333] rounded-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-xs px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: border border-[#E5E5E5] bg-transparent text-[#1A1A1A] hover:border-black hover:bg-transparent rounded-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-xs px-6 py-3

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] p-6 shadow-none rounded-sm
cards.stat: bg-white border-l-4 border-[#E88A1A] p-6 shadow-none rounded-sm
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] hover:border-[#E88A1A] transition-colors duration-300 p-6 cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] focus:border-[#E88A1A] focus:ring-0 rounded-sm h-12 text-sm placeholder:text-[#888888]
inputs.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#1A1A1A] mb-2 block

tables.header: bg-[#FAFAFA] text-[#888888] uppercase text-xs font-bold tracking-wider py-4 border-b border-[#E5E5E5]

badges.base: px-2 py-1 text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider border

universal_guidelines: NO EMOJIS allowed anywhere in the UI.
NO SHADOWS for depth; use Borders and Contrast instead.
NO ROUNDED CORNERS > 4px. Prefer sharp or 2px radius.
NO GRADIENTS. Solid flat colors only.
ALL ICONS must be stroke-based, thin (1.5px), and colored #1A1A1A or #E88A1A.
DATA VISUALIZATION: Use patterns or shades of gray/orange/black to differentiate data points, never other colors.
FORBIDDEN: Blue, Green, Red, Yellow, Purple, Teal.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE tailwind.config.js to extend colors with 'brand-orange': '#E88A1A', 'brand-black': '#1A1A1A'. Remove standard 'destructive', 'success' colors.
2. REFACTOR Sidebar: Use the #1A1A1A background. Active state is solid Orange text with white indicator.
3. REFACTOR Dashboard: Convert all Stat Cards to 'Minimal Stat'. Remove background icons. Use simple big numbers.
4. REFACTOR Tables: Remove zebra striping. Use thin gray borders. Align text left.
5. REFACTOR Login: Split screen. Left side: Image (Grayscale or muted). Right side: Clean form with Orange button.
6. DELETE unused components that add clutter.
7. ENSURE all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios (Orange on White is tricky, use Orange for graphical elements/buttons, Black for text).
